mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_items (household_id, name, category_id, store_id, quantity, threshold) VALUES (#{householdId}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{storeId}, #{quantity}, #{threshold})
mapper.select: SELECT id, household_id, name, category_id, store_id, quantity, threshold FROM inventory_items WHERE household_id = #{householdId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_items WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_items WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
